fields.raw_v1_descriptor: owner_user_id TEXT NOT NULL (FK→User by auth.uid()::text, no FK constraint)

fields.name: is_active

access_control_policies.rationale: backend service は全 record にアクセス可 (RLS bypass 相当)

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: T-V3-D-03 で spec 側を impl に合わせて alignment 完了 (impl 既稼働 / breaking-change 回避). impl 採用事項: PK = BIGSERIAL (uuid v7 非採用 / Polish-phase で再評価予定), plan は TEXT (free/pro/business/enterprise) — spec の 'team' は 'business' に統一, type は TEXT (company/individual), soft_delete カラムは無し (is_active boolean で代替). 大規模 PK width 変更は本 task で実施せず Polish-phase で再評価.

fields.raw_v1_descriptor: role TEXT DEFAULT 'owner' (account_owner/owner; impl uses TEXT not pg ENUM, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: id
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: id TEXT PRIMARY KEY (uuid stored as TEXT; impl-aligned, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: type
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: type TEXT NOT NULL (list/kanban/spec/mock_screen/mock_component/flow_map/progress/review/delivery/requirements/hearing/audit; impl uses TEXT not pg ENUM — open set for runtime extensibility, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: data
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: data JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb (impl-added; holds format/storage_url/content_preview etc. as nested keys, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: thread_id
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: thread_id BIGINT REFERENCES threads(id) ON DELETE SET NULL (impl, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: employee_id
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: employee_id BIGINT REFERENCES ai_employee_config(id) ON DELETE SET NULL (impl, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: is_archived
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: is_archived BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE (impl-added; replaces soft_delete, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: workspace_id
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: workspace_id BIGINT (FK applied post workspaces creation, T-V3-D-03)

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: T-V3-D-03 で spec 側を impl に合わせて alignment 完了. impl 採用事項: id = TEXT PRIMARY KEY (uuid を TEXT で格納 / Supabase auth との互換性), type = TEXT NOT NULL (open enum / pg ENUM は導入せず — runtime 拡張性を優先), format / storage_url / content_preview は data JSONB の nested key, tsv tsvector + embedding vector(1536) は別 migration (20260501220100_pgvector.sql) で追加予定 (現状未実装 = Polish-phase 候補), related_phase_id / related_task_id / related_session_id は data JSONB に格納, soft_delete 不採用 (is_archived boolean で代替).

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: spec 'artifact_versions' に対し impl は 'artifact_events' (イベントログ的). リネーム + 概念差異あり (version → event log)
Screen table は impl 無し. bf_mocks (E-NEW) で代替されているが Screen 単独 table としては未実装. functional-breakdown spec が Screen / Mock を分離している点と齟齬
Component table は impl 無し. design system → frontend component の関係は frontend repo の static 構造で管理されており DB 化されていない
Screen と Component の junction table 未実装. 上記 2 entity が無いため必然的に未実装

fields.name: sdk_session_id
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: sdk_session_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE (claude-agent-sdk 発行, impl-added, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: workspace_id
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: workspace_id BIGINT REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

fields.name: project_id
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: project_id BIGINT REFERENCES bf_projects(id) ON DELETE SET NULL (impl, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: bf_task_id
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: bf_task_id BIGINT REFERENCES bf_tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL (replaces spec task_id, impl-aligned, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: prompt
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: prompt TEXT NOT NULL (impl, replaces spec initial_prompt, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: status
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'running' CHECK (status IN ('running','done','crashed','cancelled','paused')); 5 values per impl (spec wanted 7; starting + completed + failed collapsed into running/done/crashed per state-machine simplification, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: crash_reason
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: crash_reason TEXT (impl-added, T-V3-D-03; replaces spec failure_reason)

fields.name: completed_at
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ (impl, replaces spec ended_at, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: metadata
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb (impl; holds cost/tokens_input/tokens_output/retry_count/failure_count/langfuse_trace_id/constitution_version_at_start as nested keys, T-V3-D-03)

fields.name: created_by
fields.raw_v1_descriptor: created_by TEXT (impl, replaces spec user_id, T-V3-D-03)

access_control_policies.name: sessions_service_role_all
access_control_policies.rationale: backend service は全 record にアクセス可 (RLS bypass 相当)

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: T-V3-D-03 で spec 側を impl に合わせて alignment 完了. impl 採用事項: PK = BIGSERIAL (uuid v7 Polish-phase), status = TEXT CHECK 5 values (running/done/crashed/cancelled/paused) — spec の starting/completed/failed は state-machine 簡素化により以下に統合: starting → 'running' に集約 (sdk_session_id 発行時点で running 開始), completed → 'done', failed → 'crashed', task_id 概念は bf_task_id に rename (Build-Factory 専用 task table), user_id 概念は created_by TEXT に rename, ended_at → completed_at, initial_prompt → prompt, failure_reason → crash_reason, cost/tokens_input/tokens_output/retry_count/failure_count/langfuse_trace_id/constitution_version_at_start は metadata JSONB に格納 (top-level column 化は Polish-phase で再評価).

entities.name: KnowledgeBase

access_control_policies.name: knowledge_base_service_role_all
access_control_policies.rationale: backend service は全 record にアクセス可 (RLS bypass 相当)

access_control_policies.name: knowledge_base_account_member_select
access_control_policies.predicate: account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM account_members WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)
access_control_policies.rationale: account_members に参加していれば SELECT 可 (既存 kb_account_shared_read policy)

access_control_policies.name: knowledge_base_account_owner_write
access_control_policies.predicate: account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM account_members WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text AND role = 'account_owner')
access_control_policies.rationale: account_owner のみ書き込み可 (既存 policy)

access_control_policies.name: knowledge_base_workspace_member_select
access_control_policies.predicate: workspace_id IS NOT NULL AND bf_can_access_workspace(workspace_id)
access_control_policies.rationale: T-V3-D-08 OPTIONAL AC-F4: workspace-scoped に設定された row のみ workspace_members 経由で SELECT 制限 (account_scoped policy への overlay)

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: v1 entities.json に未掲載. v3 で正式 entity 化. T-V3-D-08 で workspace_member_select overlay policy を追加 (account_scoped と並列).

entities.purpose: 汎用 RAG knowledge store (private/account_shared/public/ai_only 4 scope). pgvector + pg_trgm hybrid search
